since_last: 38% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.40%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 38% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.10% · BTC -0.49% · Gold +1.89% · Nasdaq100 -0.12%. 38% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.40%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.40%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -3.20%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +22.44%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +22.44%, DELL +9.84%, HPE +4.81%, CEG +4.32%, CRNC +4.29%. Laggards: PATH -13.04%, GEV -8.36%, NOW -6.48%, PLTR -6.36%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.37% at $119.38
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.37% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
